name: Mira V.
quote: The portfolio system felt premium and was easy to update before launch. The black hole motion made the site memorable without needing a heavy frontend framework.

name: Jon K.
quote: The dashboard layout made complex protocol information feel simple. HTMX interactions kept the experience fast and focused.

name: Leah R.
quote: The case-study approach helped explain governance tools to non-technical contributors and stakeholders.
